Prince and ascetics, from the Late Shah Jahan Album
by Govardhan
India, Mughal court, reign of Shah Jahan (1628-1658), Mughal Dynasty (1526-1756) · c. 1630 · Gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper
←Jules Goury Francisco de Goya→
